product.name: ArNeo Super Eco
product.familyDescriptorPl: Fluorescencyjne dzianiny hi-vis na odzież ostrzegawczą
product.familyDescriptorEn: Fluorescent hi-vis knits for safety wear
product.categorySourceGroup: High Visible Warp Knit Fabrics for Safety Jackets
product.specLine: 75 g/m², 100% Polyester, High Visible Knit Fabric
descriptions: ArNeo Super Eco 100% polyester, 70-80 g/m² warp knitted neon colored jacket fabric.
It is suitable for digital printing, thus it is possible to make company's logo printed jackets by sublimation printing.
Designed for construction and mining workers.
75 g/m², 100% Polyester, High Visible Knit Fabric
technicalParameters: Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

evidence: Designed for construction and mining workers.
applicationImageLabels: Economical High Visible Yellow/Orange Safety Jacket
acceptedMatches.rationale: Explicitly certified to EN ISO 20471 and described as a high-visibility safety jacket fabric for warning clothing.

evidence: Designed for construction and mining workers.
applicationImageLabels: Economical High Visible Yellow/Orange Safety Jacket
primary.rationale: Explicitly certified to EN ISO 20471 and marketed as an economical high-visibility safety jacket fabric for warning clothing, matching the hivis application directly.

secondary.rationale: No independently supported secondary application is present; mentions of construction/mining workers are part of the hi-vis workwear context rather than a distinct sector, and digital printing capability is a feature, not a stated end use.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Construction/mining worker mention is context for hi-vis safety jacket use, not a distinct general workwear application; certified hi-vis is the dominant and more specific classification.
Suitability for digital printing/sublimation is a feature for branding jackets, not a stated end use as printed signage or flags.
